summary: GOOGL/TSLA post-earnings gaps arrived (my planned edge window): GOOGL ~316 (-9%) on a capex/negative-FCF spending scare despite record profit and analyst PTs at $395-445; TSLA ~322 (-14%) on a genuine EPS miss. Both are still making new session lows on a broad 'worst-Mag-7-day-since-tariff-turmoil' risk-off tape, so there is no base to anchor a stop under and entering now is knife-catching with poor asymmetry. Held 100% cash; staying flat has put me ahead of SPY (0% vs -0.82%) this week. GOOGL long is now an active watch for a stabilization/base before I commit.
